BTC-USD.key_thesis: Institutional accumulation dominates: Strategy $2.54B purchase, ETF inflows $663M/day, exchange reserves at 7-year lows. Strategic Bitcoin Reserve announcement within 2 months and CLARITY Act markup imminent. Daily trend intact (EMAs aligned, ADX 31.6). Use hourly RSI pullback from 92 for entry rather than chasing current price.
BTC-USD.key_risks: Hawkish FOMC surprise April 28-29 could trigger 5-8% reversal. Hourly RSI at 92 means short-term mean-reversion risk before next leg up. Large exchange inflow spike (11K BTC/hour) shows distribution at resistance.
BTC-USD.signal_conflicts: Mean reversion strategy signals bearish due to hourly Z-score +2.20 and RSI 92 — resolved by using a pullback entry at $76,500 rather than current $78,989. Long-term thesis is bullish; the mean-reversion is a short-term tactical signal to improve entry.

ETH-USD.key_thesis: Strong institutional accumulation (Bitmine 101,627 ETH, EF largest-ever staking deposit) and 8-day ETF inflow streak ($493.7M) support bullish bias. Price coiled at critical $2,400 breakout level with short-squeeze setup from neutral/negative funding. Pectra upgrade and Glamsterdam H1 2026 are medium-term catalysts.
ETH-USD.key_risks: ETH/BTC ratio at multi-year lows limits upside vs BTC. KelpDAO hack hurt DeFi TVL and may weigh on ETH's DeFi premium. Price at resistance — failed breakout could reverse to $2,240.
ETH-USD.signal_conflicts: Breakout and momentum strategies neutral (insufficient volume confirmation) vs. bullish from trend/catalyst/news. Resolution: enter on pullback to $2,370 with confirmation rather than at resistance.

SOL-USD.key_thesis: Record Q1 on-chain activity ($1.1T volume, 25.3B transactions) conflicts sharply with price down 30% YTD. ADX at 13.8 = no trend. Price at exact midpoint of 50-SMA. Neutral until technical structure clarifies.
SOL-USD.key_risks: $83 support break triggers liquidation cascade (funding at 2-year lows means longs could be squeezed). $270M Drift exploit raised security concerns. Whale selling (51,750 SOL deposited to Binance).
SOL-USD.signal_conflicts: Catalyst trader bullish (Alpenglow + Firedancer + SOL ETF inflows) vs. 8 neutral strategies citing trendless technicals. Resolution: wait for confirmed break above $95 or hold of $83 support before taking a position.

BNB-USD.key_thesis: BNB has defensive qualities: consistent deflationary burns (1.569M BNB, ~$1.02B destroyed), strong exchange utility, and near-neutral funding. Momentum rank #2 with ADX 57.6. However, hourly RSI 87 and Z-score +2.30 signal near-term overbought. Wait for pullback to $635 before entry.
BNB-USD.key_risks: 71.9% long bias in perpetuals — if support breaks, long squeeze amplifies downside. VanEck ETF filing is pending but uncertain timeline. Hyperbridge exploit caused $2.5M losses on BNB Chain.
BNB-USD.signal_conflicts: Mean reversion bearish (hourly overbought, Z-score +2.30) vs. momentum/news bullish. Resolution: bullish lean but wait for pullback to $635 entry — same resolution as BTC.

XRP-USD.key_thesis: Strongest regulatory tailwind of any altcoin: SEC-CFTC March 2026 ruling = digital commodity. 7 live spot ETFs with $55.39M weekly inflows. 62% of supply held by whale wallets at 5-year exchange-balance lows (supply squeeze). CBDC partnerships with 300+ banks. ADX 32.6 shows real trend.
XRP-USD.key_risks: Funding rates rising to 0.008% — longs building up, potential for leveraged squeeze down. Ripple escrow releases 1B XRP monthly (potential sell pressure). $119M Coinbase inflow on April 13 warrants monitoring.
XRP-USD.signal_conflicts: Breakout strategy neutral (waiting for volume confirmation above $1.477 resistance) — resolved by strong catalyst and fundamental thesis overriding volume requirement for XRP.

ADA-USD.key_thesis: Binary hard fork event (Van Rossem) creates asymmetric catalyst risk. Smart-money accumulation (424 whale wallets, 819M ADA, $214M) signals conviction at these levels. However, daily EMA downtrend is confirmed and most technical strategies are bearish. Neutral: wait for Van Rossem hard fork deployment confirmation before entering long.
ADA-USD.key_risks: Daily EMA downtrend confirmed across multiple strategies (5 of 9 bearish on technicals). Hard forks can be 'sell the news' events. ADA historically slow on delivery timeline.
ADA-USD.signal_conflicts: 5 technical strategies bearish vs. 3 fundamental/catalyst strategies bullish due to Van Rossem hard fork and whale accumulation. Resolution: NEUTRAL — strong catalyst could override bearish technicals but requires confirmation. Enter only on breakout above $0.27 resistance.

AVAX-USD.key_thesis: Deeply washed out (90%+ from ATH) with heavily negative funding rates (-0.03% to -0.05%) creating significant short-squeeze potential. Bitwise staking ETF (5.4% APY) launched April 15 is a concrete institutional catalyst. Transaction volume at 2026 highs. However, ADX 12.7 = trendless. Entry only on confirmed break above $10.50.
AVAX-USD.key_risks: Trendless technicals (ADX 12.7) make this a low-conviction trade. Competition from Solana in DeFi/gaming sector. No volume confirmation for breakout. Could stay rangebound indefinitely.
AVAX-USD.signal_conflicts: News sentiment bullish (68%) vs. 9 technical strategies neutral — technical neutrality due to ADX 12.7 is an artifact of extended consolidation. Resolution: remain neutral until $10.50 breakout confirmed with volume.

DOT-USD.key_thesis: Strongest bearish consensus in the portfolio. Daily EMA downtrend confirmed, 6.4% below 50-SMA, all-time lows vs BTC. Hyperbridge exploit (fake 1B DOT minted on Ethereum April 13) creates security credibility damage. 28-day unstaking lag creates asymmetric selling pressure. Developer mindshare lost to Solana and ETH L2s.
DOT-USD.key_risks: TDOT ETF launch on Nasdaq is a genuine positive catalyst that could trigger short squeeze. JAM upgrade narrative could revive if delivered. Heavily short-crowded (negative funding) — squeeze risk.
DOT-USD.signal_conflicts: No meaningful bullish signals to resolve. TDOT ETF is a positive development but insufficient to counter confirmed downtrend and exploit headline risk.

MATIC-USD.key_thesis: MATIC-USD is effectively delisted on yfinance — Polygon completed 1:1 migration from MATIC to POL token by March 26, 2026. No price data available for technical analysis. Consider substituting POL-USD ticker for current analysis.
MATIC-USD.key_risks: Full token migration risk. Exchange-specific delisting. Tracking confusion between MATIC and POL across exchanges.
MATIC-USD.signal_conflicts: N/A — no data available for any strategy.

LINK-USD.key_thesis: Fundamental-to-price divergence: 1.2M LINK withdrawn from exchanges in 48 hours (strong accumulation), $68T OpenAssets tokenization partnership, CCIP zero-hack record (critical differentiator post-KelpDAO), Data Streams expanded to US equities April 12. SWIFT + 100 banks + Deutsche Bank = institutional infrastructure adoption accelerating. Sector rotation strategy signals infrastructure sector as beneficiary post-DeFi hack.
LINK-USD.key_risks: Technical trend weak (ADX 22.4 below 25 threshold, EMAs tangled). LINK's price has underperformed despite fundamental progress. Supply still elevated from staking unlock schedule. Breakout not yet triggered.
LINK-USD.signal_conflicts: 5 technical strategies neutral (weak ADX, no trend signal) vs. 5 fundamental/catalyst strategies bullish. Resolution: enter on pullback to $9.45 with catalyst thesis as primary driver — 1.2M supply withdrawal from exchanges is a concrete on-chain signal that overrides weak technical trend.
